steps.title: Track the however shift
steps.content: The passage begins with a study about ocean acidification and fish behavior, then shifts with However to a limitation: a mean sample size of only about 28 fish.

steps.title: Name the central concern
steps.content: Choice B discusses evolution, Choice C misplaces the behavior finding in 2022, and Choice D concerns the cause of ocean acidification. The passage centers on how the study's small sample size may have produced biased or exaggerated results. The answer is A.
